title: Drop down column
excerpt:
when creating chart on the drop down field, it appears the chart could not provide detail when click on it while other field types could do it. 
E.g I created a chart based on a drop down field, the pie chart show fine. …

posts.author: lxiehuan (Luke Xiehuan)
posts.cookedHtml:
when creating chart on the drop down field, it appears the chart could not provide detail when click on it while other field types could do it.

E.g I created a chart based on a drop down field, the pie chart show fine. Then I click the some area of pie chart. it just pop up but did not give me what details with this area while other field type could do that.
